name: Kelly leather clutch
description: Very Good Condition Never Used Blue Leather Hermes Portfolio Address Clutch Booklet Planner Organizer Wallet. The leather closure loops are in great shape with no major damage, the pen cap is in good shape and the original Hermes Pen is included. The inside of the booklet is in fantastic shape with no rips, tears, or any cracking to the leather lining, the original Hermes planner papers are included with this item. The inside rings are in great shape and function perfectly. The outside of the item is in fantastic shape with no major rips, tears, or any cracking of the leather, though there are some minor lines on the outside leather that occurred during the storage of the item without the dustbag or the box, not from active use. The pen is in fantastic shape but please note there is no ink inside of the pen and will need to be added. Overall this is a very nice looking pocket address portfolio book wallet from the Hermes Fashion House.  Please make sure to see all of the photos for the condition of this item! Will ship out by the next business day!
